info.description: Synth API offers programmatic access to probabilistic price forecasts for Equities, Commodities and Cryptocurrencies.
info.title: Synth

get.description: Get long and short liquidation probability estimates for an asset at various price levels. Returns the probability of liquidation within 6, 12, 18, and 24 hour windows for both long and short positions. Useful for assessing leverage risk, setting stop-loss levels, and managing margin exposure. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get price interval analysis for an asset over the next 24 hours. Returns price intervals with the probability of price staying within each interval, expected time in-range, and estimated impermanent loss. Useful for concentrated liquidity positioning, options strike selection, and range-bound trading strategies. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get the probability of an asset's price being above or below specific price targets over the next 24 hours. Returns probabilities for 11 upside and 11 downside price levels relative to the current price. Useful for options strike selection, Polymarket up/down contracts, and directional risk assessment. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData-derived option prices for an asset. Returns theoretical call and put prices across a range of strike prices with expiry time, using SynthData's ensemble volatility forecasts. Compare against market-quoted premiums to identify mispriced options. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for daily price range contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities per range, current outcome, and order book data. Compare to identify mispriced range bets. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for 15 minutes Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets on shorter timeframes. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 1h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for 5 minutes Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets on shorter timeframes. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 1h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for daily Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.description: API key

get.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for hourly Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets on shorter timeframes. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 1h)

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

get.description: Get price distribution percentiles for an asset over the 24-hour forecast horizon. Returns predicted prices at 9 percentile levels (0.5th, 5th, 20th, 35th, 50th, 65th, 80th, 95th, 99.5th), giving the full probability distribution of expected price movements. Useful for position sizing, setting price targets, and understanding tail risk. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.
get.summary: Prediction Percentiles - meta model from top 10 miners

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Get SynthData's volatility forecasts for an asset. Returns expected volatility over the next 24 hours, along with historical realized volatility.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)
parameters.name: horizon

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14 if horizon=24h, 6 if horizon=1h). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Gets the leaderboard history.

parameters.description: an URL encoded ISO 8601 date/time to start from (2025-02-03T10:19:04Z or 2025-02-03T17:19:04+07:00 or 2025-02-03)
parameters.name: start_time

parameters.description: Prompt name, high for 1h prompt or low for 24h prompt
parameters.name: prompt_name

get.description: Gets the current leaderboard.

parameters.description: Prompt name, high for 1h prompt or low for 24h prompt
parameters.name: prompt_name

get.description: Gets the meta-leaderboard history, which aggregates miners' incentives over a period of days in the past.

parameters.description: an URL encoded ISO 8601 date/time to start from (2025-02-03T10:19:04Z or 2025-02-03T17:19:04+07:00 or 2025-02-03)
parameters.name: start_time

parameters.description: Prompt name, high for 1h prompt or low for 24h prompt
parameters.name: prompt_name

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Get the current meta-leaderboard, which aggregates miners' incentives over a period of days. This provides another way to rank prediction accuracy, thereby increasing stability.

parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14)
parameters.name: days

parameters.description: Prompt name, high for 1h prompt or low for 24h prompt
parameters.name: prompt_name

get.description: Gets the latest prediction rates of the current best miner.

parameters.description: the symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPYX, NVDAX, TSLAX, AAPLX, GOOGLX
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: the time interval (in seconds) of the validator prompt between each rate. 300 or 60.
parameters.name: time_increment

parameters.description: the length of time (in seconds) of the validator prompt from the start time. 86400 or 3600.
parameters.name: time_length

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Gets the historical prediction rates.

parameters.description: a list of specific miners by their ID
parameters.name: miner

parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: the time interval (in seconds) of the validator prompt between each rate. 300 or 60.
parameters.name: time_increment

parameters.description: the length of time (in seconds) of the validator prompt from the start time. 86400 or 3600.
parameters.name: time_length

parameters.description: API key
parameters.name: Authorization

get.description: Gets the validation status for a specific miner

get.description: Gets the validation scores for all miners between two dates

parameters.description: Optional miner ID to filter by
parameters.name: miner_uid

parameters.description: The symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPYX, NVDAX, TSLAX, AAPLX, GOOGLX (default BTC)
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: the time interval (in seconds) of the validator prompt between each rate: 300 or 60 (default 300).
parameters.name: time_increment

parameters.description: the length of time (in seconds) of the validator prompt from the start time: 86400 or 3600 (default 86400)
parameters.name: time_length

get.description: Gets the most recent validation scores for all miners
